description_long: This vending machine features a sleek, rectangular form with a dark reddish-brown exterior. The front face is equipped with a large vertical touchscreen display on the right door, showing a digital interface with images and text, likely for product selection and information. To the left of the screen, there is a recessed area that appears to function as a dispenser or retrieval slot, possibly for beverages or snacks. The machine has two vertical handles running down the center, suggesting double doors for internal access. The sides and back are plain, with no visible features or openings. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or public spaces.
description: A modern, dark reddish-brown vending machine with a large touchscreen display and a recessed dispenser slot on the front. The design is sleek and minimal, with double doors and vertical handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, recessed dispenser slot, and vertical handles.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless, showing the depth and boxy shape.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain and featureless, mirroring the left side.
attribute_display_panel: A large, vertically oriented rectangular touchscreen display is located on the right front door, occupying about one-third of the front face. The screen shows a digital interface with images, text, and icons.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A recessed rectangular slot is located to the left of the touchscreen display, likely serving as the product retrieval area.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The touchscreen display shows some digital content, including a logo and text, but there is no permanent branding or signage visible on the exterior.
